name: wild lettuce
mechanism: Used in 19th-century medicine for pain and insomnia.
interactions: Insufficient direct interaction data for this herb
Consult a clinician before combining with prescription medications

safetyNotes: May cause moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. do not combine with serotonergic drugs or maois without medical guidance.
